name: Pineapple Streusel Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 medium ripe pineapple, cored, peeled, and cut into 1/4" slices
recipeInstructions:
Streusel: In a small bowl, combine brown sugar and granulated sugar. Add flour and mix to combine. Add butter and work in with fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Refrigerate in an airtight container until ready to use.
Galette: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Cut pineapple slices in half and place on paper towel to absorb juice. Arrange pineapple slices over pastry in concentric circles, overlapping them slightly, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge. Fold the pastry edge over the edges of the pineapple slices all around the galette. Sprinkle streusel over top. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Remove from oven and brush warm apricot glaze over pineapple slices. Serve lukewarm, cut into slices. (A store-bought pie shell works fine for this recipe, or make your own pastry with flour and butter [2 cups flour to 1 stick of butter]. Use ice water until it makes a pastry ball.)
